fall-harvest-salad-supreme.name: Fall Harvest Salad Supreme

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, seeded, and cut into 1-inch (2.54 cm) pieces
ribs removed and sliced into 1-inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
In a large bowl, toss the delicata squash and Brussels sprouts with 1½ tablespoons olive oil and 2 tablespoons Salad Supreme seasoning until well coated.

On a rimmed baking sheet, drizzle the chicken breasts on both sides with the remaining 1½ tablespoons olive oil and season all over with the remaining 2 tablespoons Salad Supreme seasoning. Place the chicken breasts in the center of the baking sheet and arrange the squash and Brussels sprouts all around, turning the Brussels sprouts cut-side down.
Bake for 25–30 minutes, or until the internal temperature of the chicken reaches 74°C (75°C) and the vegetables are tender and browned. Remove from the oven and let cool completely, 10–15 minutes.

While the chicken and vegetables cook, make the dressing: In a resealable jar, combine the apple cider vinegar, maple syrup, mustard, Salad Supreme seasoning, and olive oil. Cover the jar and shake vigorously until the dressing is emulsified.

Chop the chicken into 1-inch (2.54 cm) pieces, then add to a large bowl with the roasted vegetables, lettuce, kale, apple, pumpkin seeds, and candied pecans. Drizzle with some of the dressing and toss well.
Serve with the remaining dressing alongside.
Enjoy!

fancy-pear-galette.name: Fancy Pear Galette

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: melted, slightly cooled, plus 1 tbsp. room temperature

ingredients.item: -oz. cans pear halves in light or heavy syrup
Whipped cream or vanilla ice cream

instructions: Place a rack in lower third of oven and preheat to 375°. Whisk ½ cup (60 g) almond flour or meal, ¼ cup (50 g) granulated sugar, 2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. ground cardamom, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl to combine. Add 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted, slightly cooled, 1 tsp. almond extract, and 1 large egg and whisk to combine. Stir ½ cup (80 g) finely chopped candied ginger into almond cream with a rubber spatula.
If using a 17.3-oz. package of frozen puff pastry, preferably all-butter, thawed, with 2 sheets, stack sheets and roll out on a piece of parchment paper to ⅛" thick.
If using a 14-oz. package of frozen puff pastry, preferably all-butter, thawed, with 1 sheet, gently roll out on a piece of parchment paper just to smooth out any creases.

Transfer pastry on parchment to a rimmed baking sheet. Using a paring knife, score about a ½" border around all sides, cutting about halfway through. Prick pastry within border in several spots with a fork (this will keep pastry from rising too much as it bakes).

Using an offset spatula, spread almond cream evenly over pastry, staying inside border. Fan two 15-oz. cans pear halves in light or heavy syrup, drained, thinly sliced, over almond cream. Lightly beat remaining 1 large egg in a small bowl just to blend, then brush pastry border with egg. Sprinkle border with ¼ cup (30 g) sliced almonds and gently press to adhere.

Bake galette until pastry is puffed and golden and almond cream is no longer wet, 30–40 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350° and continue to bake until pastry is deep golden brown and bottom is crisp, 20–30 minutes longer. Let galette cool on baking sheet 5 minutes, then, using parchment paper, slide onto a wire rack; let cool completely.

Just before serving, heat 2 Tbsp. honey, remaining 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, and remaining ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt in a small saucepan over low, stirring occasionally, until butter is melted, about 2 minutes. Brush honey butter over galette, then sprinkle lightly with flaky sea salt. Serve with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream if desired.

farinheira-rolls-teleculinaria.name: Farinheira Rolls
instructions: Start the nine at 220 degrees. Peel and pinch the garlic tooth as well as the dried tomato. Remove the skin from the leaves and cut them into pieces.

Light a frying pan with a thread of olive oil, add the garlic and let it shine. Add the flour and dry tomato, season with salt and pepper and let cook, in mild heat, stirring from time to time, until the farinheira is undone and golden. Saute with the white wine and let it be clear for a few minutes.
Remove from the fire, sprinkle with chopped parsley, wrap well and let it cool slightly.
Unroll the leafy dough and spread over the previous preparation. Wrap in the direction of length, packing well the filling inside. Brush it later with the beaten egg.
Cut the roll into slices and dispose of them on a tray, lined with vegetable paper. Put it in the oven for 15 minutes. Take it off and let it cool a little before serving.

fast-and-delicious-black-bean-soup.name: Fast And Delicious Black Bean Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Stir in onion, bell pepper, carrot, and garlic; cook until tender, about 5 minutes. Mix in 1/2 of the black beans, then add chicken broth.

In a blender, purée remaining beans until smooth; stir into the pot and bring soup to a boil. Reduce the heat to low. Mix in ham, salt, cumin, and pepper; simmer for 20 minutes. Garnish with Cheddar cheese and sour cream to serve.

fasting-cookies-argiro.name: Fasting Cookies

ingredients.item: 120 gritting butter or other butter (in hot-water)
200 grcamboil (or sunflower oil or sesame oil)
120 gritting butter or other butter (in hot-water)
200 grcamboil (or sunflower oil or sesame oil)

instructions: Shake the flower and baking in a bowl and set aside for a while.
In a bowl, add the soft vegetarian butter, oil, sugar and mix them very well with the wire for a few minutes to visit the sugar.
We can use a mixer. I find it unnecessary in this resolution.
Dissolve the baking soda into orange juice and add them to the mixture.
Attention: dissolve them in a high vessel because it swells and spills. And better, dissolve them over the bowl with the materials, so that if it is offered into the mixture. Add the carnation.
Finally, add the sifted flour, and by hand or spatula, gently, ferment to absorb the flour.
With a dick rolling machine, spread a 0.5 cm kick leaf and cut cookies in any shape with a knife or a Coop Pat.
In a deep fish, add the season and soda.
Wet the cookies with sesame soda and place them in sheet metal, one by one.
Bake the fasting biscuits for about 20 minutes, at 160.3. in the air, or 180.3.3. in the resists, in a well-heated ocean.
Turn off the oven and let them in to draw their animation for 10 minutes. Then we put them on a grill to cool well.
They remain crunchy until the last one. We keep them in an airtight vehicle with a sea cap.

fennel-and-orange-salad-pequerecetas.name: Fennel And Orange Salad

ingredients.item: 2 bulbos de hinojo grandes, limpios y cortados en rodajas finas
4 naranjas grandes, peladas y cortadas en rodajas
1 small red onion cut into thin cuts
3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva extra virgen
1 tablespoon of vinegar from white wine or lemon juice
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: Comienza por cortar el hinojo en rodajas finas, utilizando una mandolina si es posible para asegurar uniformidad. Haz lo mismo con la cebolla roja.
with a sharp knife, pits the oranges, making sure you remove all the white skin. Then cut the oranges into slices or segments as you prefer.

At a large source, we have a base of fringes of henzo, followed by fringes of orange and red onion. If you decide to include black olives, scatter a few above. Also add pineapples that will give you a delicious contrast.
Mix olive oil with vinegar or lemon juice, salt and pepper into a small bowl. Fold the dressing onto the salad just before serving to maintain the freshness and crisp texture of the fennel.

fennel-cream-and-delicious-pequerecetas.name: Fennel Cream, And Delicious
fennel-cream-and-delicious-pequerecetas.original_name: Crema de hinojo, fácil y deliciosa
instructions: He starts by cleaning and cutting his ham and onion and his leek. For the fennel, remove the tougher and shorter outer layer into medium pieces. He finely pics his onion and his leek.

In a large pot, add some olive oil and sock onion and leek till tender and transparent. Add the fennel to the pot and have a cold for a few minutes. It looks for a good impregnation of the frying taste. Salpimenta slightly

Fold the vegetable stock into the pot and lead to boiling. It reduces the fire and lets them cook at low heat till the fennel's completely tender. Once the fennel is soft, remove the pot from the fire. Use a hand mixer or food processor to smash all ingredients up to a smooth and homogenous cream.
Replace the pot into the fire and add the cream. Mix well and cook with low heat for a few minutes. Retirement of salt and pepper to taste. Serve the hot cream.

fettuccine-with-chicken-leeks-and-gorgon.name: Fettuccine With Chicken, Leeks, And Gorgonzola

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil. Cook fettuccine at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain and toss with 1 tablespoon olive oil. Set aside and keep warm.

Heat remaining tablespoon olive oil and butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add chicken and leeks; cook and stir until leeks are tender and chicken is no longer pink in the center and juices run clear, 5 to 7 minutes. Add garlic; cook and stir until fragrant, 1 to 2 minutes. Pour in chicken broth; continue cooking 2 to 3 minutes more. Pour in heavy cream. Reduce heat; let simmer until thickened, about 5 minutes.

Stir Gorgonzola cheese and walnuts into the skillet with the chicken; continue to simmer until cheese has melted, 2 to 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Toss with cooked pasta. Top with parsley.

fish-medallions-with-shrimp-teleculinari.name: Fish Medallions With Shrimp
instructions: Season the fish medallions with salt and reserve. Peel and peel the onion and garlic; peel the skin and seeds from the tomato and cut it into cubes; cut the leek into half-moons; peel the shrimps, leaving their head and tail, make a slight cut on the loin and remove their guts.

Take a frying pan to the fire with the olive oil and the blond and let it warm. Add the onion and garlic, add the shrimps, season with salt and pyri and let it blush. Add the tomato, leek and fish and cook it on both sides. Water with the white wine and let it boil.
Acrescente o creme de marisco, mexendo bem, assim como os coentros grosseiramente picados. Envolva, retire do lume e transfira para um prato.

Prepare the rice: aloure the chopped onion in the olive oil, then add the rice and stir. Let it cook a little, add the water to boil, salt and saffron and cook for about 10 minutes. Finally, wrap the raisins and serve as a side of the medallions.

five-flavor-pound-cake.name: Five Flavor Pound Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a 10-inch tube pan.
Combine flour and baking powder in a medium bowl; set aside. Combine milk and extracts in a liquid measure; set aside.

Cream sugar, butter, and shortening in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in flour mixture alternately with milk mixture in batches, beginning and ending with flour mixture. Spoon mixture into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
While cake is cooling, make glaze: Combine sugar, water, and extracts in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring until sugar is dissolved.
Turn cake out onto the wire rack. Place waxed paper under the rack to catch glaze drippings. Slowly spoon glaze over the top of hot cake. Cool completely.

flaxels-crispy-fried-oysters.name: Flaxel's Crispy Fried Oysters

ingredients.prep: pulsed to coarse meal (no bigger than 1/8 inches) in a food processor

instructions: Drain oysters. Beat eggs in a medium bowl until blended. Add oysters and turn to coat completely.

Pour half of the saltine crumbs into a 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Working in batches, lift oysters with a slotted spoon, allowing excess egg to drain back into the bowl, and transfer to the baking dish. Scatter the remaining crumbs over the oysters and toss to coat.
Cover the dish and chill for 2-3 hours.
Line a plate with paper towels. Pour oil into a medium heavy skillet to a depth of 1/2 inch. Prop a deep-fry thermometer in the skillet so the bulb is submerged.
Heat oil over medium heat to 191°C (191°C).
Working in batches, fry oysters, turning once, until the coating is crisp and deep golden brown, about 1 minute per batch.
Transfer to paper towels and season with salt.

flourless-sugar-free-cake-lezzet.name: Flourless Sugar-free Cake
instructions: 1. Make Bananas pure with the help of fork.
2. Add and mix honey on it.
3. In a separate container, add eggs on the grass, and mix well.
4. Add Kakao, carbonate, salt and cinnamon and mix again with the help of wooden spoon.
5. Take the mixture into the lubricated cake mold.
6. Bake 25-30 minutes in the oven preheated 200 degrees.
7. Decorate with File nuts and serve warm.

fluffy-mandarin-cake-with-oil-argiro.name: Fluffy Mandarin Cake With Oil

ingredients.item: 21⁄2 cup of flower that inflates itsself sifted
A little flower for the form
21⁄2 cup of flower that inflates itsself sifted
A little flower for the form

instructions: Butter very well (and recesses) and flore a round cake form. Preheat the evening to 170°C, in the air.

Mix the fine sugar with the zest in a bowl and rub the mixture with the ringers until the sugar is liquefied and yellow by the zest. If we have time, let it stand for 15 minutes, so that the tangerine can take off all its perfume.
Add the eggs and beat them with a hand mixer for 4 minutes, to fluffy the mixture, melt the sugar complete and inflate the eggs.
Add the oil, juice, soda and salt and mix.
Then incorporated the Sieved flour, generally stirring with spatula until absorbed – the mixture in the end is quite thin.
Empty the dough in the ready form and beat the vessel once or two on the counter to remove the beaten air.
Bake the cake on the medium rack of the preheated ocean for about 50 minutes or until it is puffed, browned and the blade of the knife that we will sink into its heart comes out dry.
Allow it to stand for 10 minutes in its form and then dissipate on a grill to cool complete.
Meanwheele, we prepare the tangerine cream. Mix in a small pot the juice, cornflaur, zest and sugar until homogenized.
Leave the mixture in low heat until brightly bang.
Cover the cream with a kitchen membrane which should be tangent to its surface by preparing crust formation and letting it cool.
Finally, mix it to fluffy and transfer to pastry corn.
Garnish the tangerini cake with the aromatic cream and serve.

freezer-friendly-frittata.name: Freezer-friendly Frittata

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Lightly coat a deep 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.

Combine eggs, onion, mushrooms, ham, milk, Colby-Jack cheese, and goat cheese in a large bowl; beat well. Pour egg mixture into the prepared baking dish. Sprinkle with chopped bacon, Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven until eggs are set and the edges are golden brown, about 30 minutes. Allow to cool slightly, slice into 8 pieces, and serve.

french-toast-stuffed-with-apple-teleculi.name: French Toast Stuffed With Apple
instructions: Gently remove the crust from the dry talk.
Open them, split them the apple candy and close them again.
Pass them through the warm milk and squeeze them slightly. Then pass them through the beaten eggs and fry them on both sides in hot oil. Remove and drain on absorbent paper.
After a run, pass the French toast through a mixture of sugar and cinnamon. Serve with decor to taste.

fresh-fig-and-walnut-cookies.name: Fresh Fig And Walnut Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
Cream sugar, shortening, and vanilla together in a mixing bowl. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.

Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, cloves, and salt together in a separate bowl. Add to the wet ingredients and mix until blended; mixture will be a little dry. Stir in figs and walnuts; mixture will get added moisture from the figs. Use a medium cookie scoop to drop spoonfuls of batter onto the prepared cookie sheet.

Bake in the preheated oven until edges start to brown, 12 to 13 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before removing to a wire rack to cool completely. Repeat to scoop and bake remaining batches.

fresh-peach-bellini-jelly.name: Fresh Peach Bellini Jelly

ingredients.prep: peeled, halved, pitted, cut into wedges, plus 1 unpeeled peach, cut into 6 wedges (for garnish)

instructions: Spoon 3 tablespoons water into small heatproof bowl; sprinkle gelatin over and stir to blend. Let stand until gelatin softens, about 10 minutes.

Puree peeled peach wedges in processor until smooth. Transfer 2 cups peach puree to small saucepan (reserve any remaining peach puree for another use). Add sugar to peach puree in saucepan and stir over medium heat until sugar dissolves; transfer mixture to medium bowl.

Pour enough water into small skillet to reach depth of 1 inch; bring to simmer. Reduce heat to very low. Set bowl with gelatin in hot water in skillet; stir often until gelatin is completely dissolved and mixture is fluid, about 2 minutes. Add gelatin mixture to peach puree mixture; stir until blended. Stir in wine and lemon juice. Let mixture stand until foam subsides, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes. Fill large bowl with ice cubes and water. Set bowl with peach mixture in bowl with ice water; stir constantly with rubber spatula until mixture is cool to touch, 2 to 3 minutes.
Divide Bellini mixture among six 7- to 8-ounce Champagne flutes; cover each with plastic wrap and chill until mixture is softly set, at least 4 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Place 1 unpeeled peach wedge onto rim of each Champagne flute and serve.

fresh-peach-cake.name: Fresh Peach Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch springform pan.

Beat 3/4 cup sugar and butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl, then sift over butter mixture. Mix to combine. Transfer cake batter to the prepared springform pan and spread evenly.
Arrange peach slices on the batter. Mix together 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl until well combined; sprinkle over peaches and batter.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 40 to 50 minutes. Cool briefly on a wire rack; run a table knife around the edges to loosen and transfer carefully onto a wire rack to cool completely.

fresno-chile-hot-sauce.name: Fresno Chile Hot Sauce
instructions: Cook chiles and garlic in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until chiles turn bright red, about 2 minutes; drain. Blend chiles, garlic, and vinegar in a blender until almost smooth; season with salt. Let cool.
DO AHEAD: Hot sauce can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

fried-chicken-argiro.name: Fried Chicken
instructions: Let the Chicken first come to room temperature.
Tapon it well to dry with abstract paper.
Place on a platter, sprinkle some flour and add salt and pepper.
Mix to powder well.

fried-easter-cod-teleculinaria.name: Fried Easter Cod
instructions: Pass the pieces of tomato through water and let it run down a slider. Reserve. Cut the cod loins in half and eliminate the spines. Season it with 50 ml of olive oil and 2 cloves of chopped garlic and cover it with milk. Reserve.

Descasque as cebolas e os restantes alhos, corte as cebolas em meias-luas e os alhos em rodelas. Leve ao lume um tacho com o restante azeite, as folhas de louro, a cebola e o alho e deixe alourar. Junte o tomate escorrido e deixe cozinhar. Tempere com sal, pimenta e o colorau, mexa e retire do lume.

Peel and cut the potatoes in rooms and bake them in salted water. Then pour, reduce the mashed potatoes and add the milk from the coed cod until you get the desired texture. Add the butter, season with salt, pepper and nutmeg and stir well.
Pass the cod chips by flour, by the slightly beaten eggs and finally by grated bread. Shake the excess and fry on both sides in hot oil. Remove and let it run on absorbent paper.
Put the cod and onion on a platter. Have the mashed potatoes next to you, with the help of a pastry bag with a mouthful. Decorate with olives and chopped parsley and serve immediately.

fried-green-tomato-parmesan.name: Fried Green Tomato Parmesan
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.
Whisk eggs in a small bowl until smooth. Pour bread crumbs into a shallow dish.
Dip each tomato slice in egg, then press into bread crumbs to coat. Arrange coated tomato slices in a single layer on the prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden, about 5 minutes per side.

Pour 3 cups spaghetti sauce into the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish. Top with a layer of tomato slices. Layer with 1/2 of the mozzarella and 1/4 cup Parmesan. Repeat layers with remaining 3 cups spaghetti sauce, tomatoes, remaining mozzarella, and 1/4 cup Parmesan. Sprinkle basil over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 35 minutes.

fried-hake-with-feta-cheese-argiro.name: Fried Hake With Feta Cheese

ingredients.item: 2 eving fresh onions with their leaves chopped
2 eving fresh onions with their leaves chopped

instructions: First we clean up and Wash the Tender bags.
Allow a colander to draw and dry well.
Then cut them into something pieces.
Clean the leek and fresh versions and then chop them.

fried-oysters-with-bacon-garlic-and-sage.name: Fried Oysters With Bacon, Garlic, And Sage

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 2 teaspoons morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk rice flour, salt, and cayenne in a medium bowl. Toss oysters in flour mixture to coat well, then top with a thin layer of dredge (make sure that none of the oysters are peeking out). Cover with plastic wrap and chill in dredge until ready to fry.
Cook bacon in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-low, stirring occasionally, until bacon is browned and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Transfer bacon to a small bowl with a slotted spoon.

Pour half of bacon fat into a small heatproof bowl or measuring cup and set aside. Add ½ cup butter to drippings in skillet and heat over medium-high. As soon as butter is foaming, remove half of oysters from dredge and shake off any excess. Add to skillet along with 3 garlic cloves and cook, gently shaking skillet to baste oysters with fat and turning oysters occasionally, until golden brown and crisp all over, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer oysters and garlic to paper towels and let drain.

Pour off fat in skillet; discard. Wipe out skillet and return to medium-high. Heat remaining ½ cup butter and reserved bacon fat in skillet. As soon as butter is foaming, repeat process with remaining oysters and garlic. Transfer to paper towels and let drain.
Cook sage in same skillet just until crisp, about 30 seconds. Transfer to paper towels.
Arrange oysters and garlic on a platter and top with fried sage and bacon. Serve with mustard.
Do Ahead: Oysters can be dredged 4 hours ahead. Keep chilled.

frikadellen-traditional-german-burger-re.name: Frikadellen (traditional German Burger Recipe)

ingredients.item: 1/2 kg de carne picada, mitad ternera y mitad cerdo

instructions: We peel and tipple the onion. We polish with soft fire so that it remains very soft with minimum heat. When it starts to fall asleep, we scrape and reserve.

In a large bowl we mix the flesh with a pint of salt, black pepper, some oregano, milk-wet bread, mustard and onion. We mix so well till it's all integrated with our hands we get portions with which we form some balls we put up.
We fry them in an oil frying pan till they are golden, at which time we get out and leave them on kitchen paper to absorb excess fat.
We serve them hot with mashed potatoes and homemade chucrut.

frozen-churros-in-air-fryer-pequerecetas.name: Frozen Churros In Air Fryer
frozen-churros-in-air-fryer-pequerecetas.original_name: Churros congelados en freidora de aire
instructions: We purport air frying for 5 minutes at 200ºC.

We place frozen churros in the air fryer basket, with care to avoid placing them and leave some space with them. We have a little olive oil with an oil spray and have been scheduled for 10 minutes at 200 and 3.
A mitad de tiempo, les damos la vuelta con cuidado con unas pinzas de silicona para que se hagan por los dos lados.

After time, we check if they're made or we leave them some more minutes if we care about more facts. We get them out of the basket with care with the silicone clamps, put them into a bowl, let them temple about 10 minutes and bounce them into the sugar and cinnamon mixture. We serve with hot chocolate, cocoa or what we propose to enjoy our churros.

funeral-potatoes-hash-brown-casserole.name: Funeral Potatoes (hash Brown Casserole)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Combine Cheddar cheese, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, 1/2 cup melted butter, and onions in a large bowl. Gently fold in hash browns and spread out in the prepared baking dish. Cover evenly with crushed corn flakes and drizzle with 2 tablespoons melted butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
